rows.label: qev035404_MSG0001
rows.name:
You fight as splendidly as ever!
And not only that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035404_MSG0002
rows.name:
...That idiocy of yours is worthy of praise too!
As expected of Quincy Team's helper![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035404_MSG0003
rows.name: The Crimson Tear, huh... It's quite a beautiful gem, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035404_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'll go ahead and turn this into our reward,
so Chief, you can just go lick your wounds
together with that bastard Quincy like the losers you are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev035404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Haha! You soft-hearted fools, you know?
You'll spend your whole lives having all the good stuff
snatched away by guys like us![ST:wait ]
